description_long: This apple is round with a slightly flattened top and bottom, featuring a short, light brown stem protruding from the top. Its skin is predominantly a mix of red and yellow hues, with some areas appearing more muted or faded. There are several visible blemishes, including a large brown patch on the bottom and dark spots on the sides, suggesting bruising or rot. The surface appears smooth but not glossy, with a natural, slightly matte finish typical of apples. The coloration is uneven, with some areas more saturated in red and others pale yellow or light brown. The apple's overall appearance suggests it is past peak ripeness and has been handled or stored for some time.
description: A round, red-yellow apple with visible blemishes and a matte surface.
description_view_0: Top view showing the stem and two dark blemishes.
description_view_1: Side view with a large brown patch and red-yellow skin.
description_view_2: Rear view with mostly pale yellow and faint red coloration.
description_view_3: Side view with both the large brown patch and a dark spot visible.
attribute_visible_damage_or_blemishes: large brown patch and dark spots
